hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.mjs|*.cjs) out=$(pnpm exec oxlint "$file" --deny-warnings --fix --fix-suggestions 2>&1); [ $? -ne 0 ] && echo "$out" | tail -30;; *.vue|*.astro) out=$(pnpm exec oxlint "$(dirname "$file")/" --deny-warnings --fix --fix-suggestions 2>&1); [ $? -ne 0 ] && echo "$out" | tail -30;; esac
input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.vue) pnpm exec oxfmt "$file" 2>/dev/null;; esac
input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$file" in *.scss|*.sass) out=$(pnpm exec stylelint "$file" --fix 2>&1); [ $? -ne 0 ] && echo "$out" | tail -20;; esac

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); base=$(basename "$file"); case "$base" in .env|.env.*) if [ "$base" != ".env.example" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files. Use .env.example instead.'; exit 2; fi;; esac
